text:
When i try install 3.0-RELEASE my computer hang on, on the screen at
this time "Waiting 15 seconds for SCSI devices to settle" message.
I think, i have problem with my SCSI adapter (BusLogic BT-958).
Computer Digital Prioris LX 5150.

I do'nt know.
How-To-Repeat: Try another installetion.
